+        "title": "Review oras configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oras configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get configmap -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oras\n```\n### What is the version of your ORAS CLI\n\n1.0.0\n\n### What would you like to be added?\n\nAdd a new command to get the digest of a tagged manifest as below:\n```console\n$ oras resolve -h\nResolves digest of the target artifact\n\nUsage:\n  oras resolve"

+        "title": "Apply the fix for add command to get the digest of a tagged manifest without…",

+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oras -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oras\nkubectl get events -n oras --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"add command to get the digest of a tagged manifest without…\" is functioning correctly."
